svg.text: Voice-first interactive storytelling · Google Cloud Run · Gemini Live API · Vertex AI
Single service · Cloud Build CI/CD · Docker multi-stage build · taleweaver.online
TailwindCSS v3 · Framer Motion · AudioWorklet · AudioBufferSourceNode
Each chunk starts exactly when previous ends · no queue
Session lifecycle · AudioContext resume on mic start · barge-in
Tool-call path (no rate limit) · fallback every 8s · unlimited scenes
First image + opening text ready before Begin is clicked
→ ThemeSelect (🏠): theme tile / Magic Camera / Sketch
Badge queue · shimmer loading cards · waveform display
Inline storybook · narration captions · saves title+narrations
Story cards grid → StorybookView (narrations + badges + The End)
FastAPI Backend — Python 3.13 · Uvicorn · SPA fallback
All endpoints stateless · parallel-safe · no stored state
Bidirectional audio bridge: browser ↔ Gemini Live
Injects character system prompt + voice config
Sends "Begin!" before proxy starts · 15 min timeout
proactive_audio · affective dialog · VAD LOW sensitivity
10 voices · anti-repetition · content safety · no bad input ignored
4-beat story plan per session · returns opening_text hint
ADK LlmAgent generates story plan → used to seed Gemini Live
Flash Lite: story plan + opening line + first scene description
→ image gen → canvas seeded before Begin click
Direct image gen from narration or tool call description
prev image + scene passed for visual continuity
Flash Lite safety check on custom themes → SAFE / UNSAFE
Flash Lite labels sketch → storybook illustration preview
Receives actual session images (base64) + character context
asyncio.gather → parallel per-image narration → title + captions
Narrations + title → saved to localStorage gallery
Output: 24kHz PCM audio + output transcription (Gemini → speakers)
Barge-in: child interrupts mid-sentence via VAD
proactive_audio + affective dialog enabled · LOW speech sensitivity
2s silence timeout · 10 unique voices · system prompt per character
Anti-repetition · no story ending · content safety call-out · 5-7 sentence flows
Called at: scene changes, character reveals, dramatic moments
skip_extraction=true — narration passed directly to image model
Frontend responds immediately — Gemini doesn't wait for image
Only on explicit child verbal creativity (story idea, imaginative suggestion)
Max 2 per session · badge popup overlay auto-dismisses after 3s
Saved in StoryGalleryEntry.badges → shown in Past Adventures
Model inference via Vertex AI · gemini-live-2.5-flash-native-audio
Google Cloud AI Platform · Application Default Credentials · us-central1
STORY + SCENE format · coherent plan + opening line
Custom themes, sketches, camera props → SAFE / UNSAFE
Camera prop / drawing → storybook illustration label
scene_description (from tool call or turn text) + story context
Previous image + scene description passed as reference
SAFETY_PREFIX on all prompts · character image_style descriptor
Retry once on 500 · 8s minimum between fallback images · tool calls bypass all limits
Actual session images (base64) + character name + style
Each image narrated in character voice · 2 sentences · no hallucination
recapTitle + narrations[] patched into localStorage gallery entry
child-safe · no violence · no adult themes
narrations + title returned → saved to gallery
